CMS-HCC risk scores for beneficiaries who are new enrollees are based on demographic factors only, even if those beneficiaries have CMS-HCC flags. NUM 15 - - - - - - - - - x x
BENE_RSK_R_SCRE_01 Monthly CMS-HCC Risk Score 1 Monthly final, prospective risk score based on the applicable risk adjustment model for the MA payment year corresponding to the report
